# GET /api/v1/notifications/unread

**Get unread notifications**

الإشعارات غير المقروءة - API-NOTIF-004 (GOVERNANCE-NOTE-BLOCKED, see DRV-NOTIF-003)

Operation ID: `unread`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

## Response `200` — OK

Shape: `NotificationUnreadSummary`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| count | integer (int64) | No |  | Unread count |
| items | array<NotificationLogResponse> | No |  | Unread notification log entries |

| items[].recipientId | integer (int64) | No |  | Recipient user ID (Security USERS_PK) |
| items[].notificationTypeId | string | No |  | Channel used for this row (LOV-NOTIF-001) |
| items[].templateCode | string | No |  | Template natural code |
| items[].subject | string | No |  | Subject (primarily Email channel) |
| items[].bodyPreview | string | No |  | Short preview of the sent content |
| items[].notificationStatusId | string | No |  | Delivery status (LOV-NOTIF-002) |
| items[].retryCount | integer (int32) | No |  | Delivery retry attempts (ceiling 5) |
| items[].sentAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Actual send timestamp — null until sent |
| items[].moduleCode | string | No |  | Publishing module code |
| items[].referenceId | integer (int64) | No |  | Polymorphic reference to the related business record |
| items[].referenceType | string | No |  | Related entity type name |
| items[].createdAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Created timestamp |
| items[].createdBy | string | No |  | Created by |
| items[].updatedAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Updated timestamp |
| items[].updatedBy | string | No |  | Updated by |
